title: Kyanjin Tea House
prompt: A website for a small Himalayan tea house selling carefully sourced tea internationally. It should feel intimate, tactile, premium, and culturally grounded without looking like a tourism advertisement.

direction.name: Altitude & paper
direction.thesis: A quiet, tactile tea catalogue organized by garden altitude — warm paper surfaces, editorial serif voice, contour-line motifs drawn from survey maps rather than tourism imagery.
direction.signature: Every tea is presented by the elevation of its garden, on a contour-line altitude scale that structures the whole catalogue.
